dataset: 10 documents (3 PDF + 7 Markdown), 20 EN + 5 CN queries
environment: local embedding (all-MiniLM-L6-v2), chunk=512, overlap=64, BM25+vector hybrid
changelog: llamaindex_tools: added SentenceSplitter(chunk=512, overlap=64) for balanced chunking
llamaindex_tools: added cross-lingual fallback (BM25 max<0.1 -> pure vector)
rerank_tools: _load_reranker now caches model as function attribute
